claims.subject: tet(Y)
claims.evidence_span: resistance phenotypes to several antibiotics (oxytetracycline...) were predominantly attributable to...tet(Y)

claims.subject: sul2
claims.evidence_span: resistance phenotypes to several antibiotics (...sulphonamides...) were predominantly attributable to...sul2

claims.subject: floR
claims.evidence_span: resistance phenotypes to several antibiotics (...florfenicol) were predominantly attributable to...floR

claims.subject: PhoP/Q two-component system mutations
claims.evidence_span: isolates with low and high MIC values to colistin showed mutations in...PhoP/Q two-component system

claims.subject: LPS-modifying genes
claims.evidence_span: diversity of known LPS-modifying genes involved in colistin resistance was also detected in resistant isolates
